top3.sql:
SELECT MIN(l.Date)
FROM Laboratory l
JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
WHERE l.LDH IS NOT NULL
  AND l.LDH <= (SELECT MAX(LDH) FROM Laboratory WHERE LDH <= 250)
ORDER BY l.LDH DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT MIN(Date)
FROM Laboratory
WHERE LDH = (
    SELECT MAX(LDH)
    FROM Laboratory
    WHERE LDH BETWEEN 120 AND 240
);

SELECT MIN(l.Date)
FROM Laboratory l
JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
WHERE l.LDH IS NOT NULL
  AND l.LDH <= (SELECT MAX(LDH) FROM Laboratory WHERE LDH <= 250)
ORDER BY l.LDH DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT MIN(Date)
FROM Laboratory
WHERE LDH = (
    SELECT MAX(LDH)
    FROM Laboratory
    WHERE LDH BETWEEN 120 AND 240
);

SELECT MIN(l.Date)
FROM Laboratory l
WHERE l.LDH IS NOT NULL
  AND l.LDH <= 250
  AND l.LDH = (
    SELECT MAX(LDH)
    FROM Laboratory
    WHERE LDH IS NOT NULL
      AND LDH <= 250
  );

SELECT MIN(l.Date)
FROM Laboratory l
JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
WHERE l.LDH IS NOT NULL
  AND l.LDH <= (SELECT MAX(LDH) FROM Laboratory WHERE LDH <= 250)
ORDER BY l.LDH DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT MIN(Date)
FROM Laboratory
WHERE LDH = (
    SELECT MAX(LDH)
    FROM Laboratory
    WHERE LDH BETWEEN 120 AND 240
);

  AND l.LDH <= 250
  AND l.LDH = (

    WHERE LDH IS NOT NULL

final.sql:
SELECT MIN(l.Date)
FROM Laboratory l
JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
WHERE l.LDH IS NOT NULL
  AND l.LDH <= (SELECT MAX(LDH) FROM Laboratory WHERE LDH <= 250)
ORDER BY l.LDH DESC
LIMIT 1;
